channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large furniture cushion south pavement, 22nd May
item.description:
Large cushion south pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warwick Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large carpet left outside, south pavement, 22nd May
item.description:
Carpet on pavement south side
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warwick Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned untaxed van with no MOT, 22nd May
item.description:
As above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Howerd Way, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked alleyway, 22nd May
item.description:
Submitted again as these are not trees and bushes from a private garden. These are trees and bushes growing in an alleyway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Brantwood Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 22nd May
item.description:
Vehicle abandoned from when the owner left the property he was renting weeks ago

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lea Vale, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large mattress dumped in front of 14 Bodney road, 22nd May
item.description:
This mattress was put in front of our house last night and we discovered it this morning. Could we please ask for it to be removed asap?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bodney Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath 62, 22nd May
item.description:
Dumped household waste, trolley and loose discarded rubbish on verge side.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Unit 1, Leigh Place, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox for disposal, 22nd May
item.description:
As instructed on website in 2 bags, sealed and reported for disposal.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Stone Road, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ridgesn across the tarmac, 22nd May
item.description:
I had to walk down Murray Ave yesterday pushing my husband in a wheel chair. Found this very difficult in places but the tarmacked area outside 87 and 89 Murray Avenue was practically impossible as I had to tip the wheel chair in order to get over the roots. Also very difficult crossing South View as the crossing places are bricks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Murray Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed frame left on the pavement near 1 Ruskin Walk, 22nd May
item.description:
A bedframe - springs - has been left on the pavement resting at the side of the house fence at the side of 111 Herne Hill, near 1 Ruskin Walk.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Ruskin Walk, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bicycles on pavement not in parking place, 22nd May
item.description:
Pavement impassable. Danger to people with visual disability.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Limesford Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 22nd May
item.description:
Horsebox dumped in this location 2 months ago. Please could the council remove it, no-one is going to claim it. It is just a magnet for more rubbish and is slowly becoming buried under dumped furniture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Old Maidstone Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned filled up recycle bin, 22nd May
item.description:
There is an abandoned recycle bin (full of bottle cans) for months on alleyway. The bin is obstruction and hazard for residents and pedestrians. Could it be removed asap, thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TV and a bin bag, in alleyway next to 119a Erith Road, 22nd May
item.description:
A Television and a bin bag has been dumped on alleyway for more than a week. Alleyway between 119a and 121 Erith Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass and litter on Truman’s Road, 22nd May
item.description:
There’s lots of broken glass on either side of the pavement on Truman’s Road, plus lots of litter as there doesn’t seem to have been a barrow beat clean today.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salcombe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Fridges, 22nd May
item.description:
Several fridges and doors etc on side of road outside Upton Primary School.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mount Drive, Blendon, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Caravan...., 22nd May
item.description:
Still there and causing a danger, despite assurance that it would be gone on Wednesday following the notice period. If it is not gone by 01 June it will be towed to council offices for you!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2B, Betterton Drive, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: From of swing insecure, 22nd May
item.description:
When the big circle rope swing is being used, the frame of the swing moves with the swing and rocks back and forth

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Church Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree needs pruning, 22nd May
item.description:
The tree outside 103/105 Murray Avenue is in desperate need of pruning. Constant debris and small branches falling on cars in windy conditions plus satellite signal is now blocked

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Murray Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress, 22nd May
item.description:
Somebody from Abington court dumped their mattress on the curb it has now fallen down and is obstructing the pathway and the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hendre Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
